description_long: This is a dark, round-bodied bottle with a narrow cylindrical neck and a thick, integrated handle connecting the neck to the shoulder. The surface is textured and appears aged, with visible wear and a matte finish. One side of the bottle features a prominent, sculpted animal face, possibly resembling a stylized feline or bear, with large eyes and a broad snout. The bottle's body is slightly faceted, giving it a hand-crafted, rustic appearance. The coloration is predominantly dark brown with lighter patches and some white speckling, suggesting weathering or mineral deposits. The overall form and decorative motif evoke traditional or ancient pottery styles.
description: A dark, round-bodied bottle with a sculpted animal face and a thick handle, featuring a weathered, matte surface and hand-crafted appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sculpted animal face and the thick handle arching from the neck to the shoulder.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the faceted, rounded back and the full profile of the handle and neck, with no animal face visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the animal face in profile and the curvature of the bottle's body.
description_view_3: Direct view of the animal face, showing its detailed features and the bottle's neck above.
